name: pointing-hand
description: a friendly cartoon human hand with a NATURAL LIGHT PEACH SKIN TONE (warm beige, NOT yellow, NOT orange), index finger clearly extended pointing to the right while the other fingers and thumb are gently curled into the palm, simple rounded mitten-like cartoon fingers, plain shirt cuff at the wrist
full_prompt:
A single, centered a friendly cartoon human hand with a NATURAL LIGHT PEACH SKIN TONE (warm beige, NOT yellow, NOT orange), index finger clearly extended pointing to the right while the other fingers and thumb are gently curled into the palm, simple rounded mitten-like cartoon fingers, plain shirt cuff at the wrist, drawn as ONE object only.
Style: flat papercraft vector sticker / children's-book cut-paper illustration. Bold, solid FLAT fills with absolutely NO gradients, NO shading, NO highlights, NO drop shadows, NO photographic realism, NO 3D, NO texture. Every shape is one uniform color. A clean, even, dark navy outline (deep navy #24324B) traces every shape with a consistent medium-thick line weight, like a coloring-book.
Color palette — use ONLY these, flat and saturated: warm coral (#FF8A65), sunshine yellow (#FFD85A), sky blue (#5EC8F8), mint green (#66DDAA), with the dark navy (#24324B) reserved for the outline. Wood/natural elements may use a flat warm tan from the same family. Keep it to two or three fill colors total — simple.
Background: PLAIN PURE WHITE, completely empty, no scene, no surface, no shadow.
The object fills most of the frame, centered, friendly and rounded.
No text, no letters, no numbers, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no border.
license: Generated author-time by Google Gemini image model. Output is a static, committed asset; no per-use attribution required, subject to Google's generative-AI terms. Provenance recorded here for audit.
